title: Tropical-Modern Five-Bedroom Villa with Swim-Up Bar & Rooftop Cinema, Canggu
blurb: A design-led five-bedroom villa in the heart of Canggu — a 26-metre infinity pool with a swim-up bar, a rooftop cinema lawn, an indoor gym, ice bath and Finnish sauna, and tropical-modern architecture by Design Assembly.
detail:
Good vibes, a great location and the best island aesthetic come together at this five-bedroom villa in Canggu — an enclave that draws travellers worldwide to its surf spots, sun-kissed cafés and beach clubs. Marrying modern aesthetics with tropical architecture, the home was built by Design Assembly for the ultimate Bali getaway, with art, design, nature and wellness in beautiful harmony.

Its amenities are extensive: a stunning infinity pool with a swim-up bar, a rooftop cinema lawn with an outdoor projector, an indoor gym, a pilates room, an ice bath and a Finnish-style sauna. Sculptural windows look out to a verdant garden, while a high-ceiling sunken lounge, picture-perfect indoor and outdoor dining areas, striped daybeds and a pool with rice-field views set the scene for slow, social days.

Ultra-photogenic touches abound — a stairway wrapped around a gravity-defying frangipani tree, walls adorned with murals by Bali-based artists, and a Brutalist-style entryway leading to the guest rooms, all tied together by pitch-perfect lighting design. Sleeping up to ten across five en-suite bedrooms, it's a short walk to Canggu's most-loved cafés, bakeries and beach clubs.

features.l: 26 m infinity pool with swim-up bar
Walk to Canggu cafés & beach clubs
